art.summary: March 22, 2026: 'Radical Possibilities: Art in Protest' exhibition in Petoskey and 'Art by the Sea Youth Arts Festival' in Miami Beach highlighting World Water Day. New attention on Pippa El-Kadhi Brown and Astrid Specht Seeberg.
art.notable: Focus on ocean stewardship and socially engaged art; re-emerging historical works continue to drive interest.

market.summary: Global equities remain under pressure (-6.8% from Jan highs) amid Middle East energy supply concerns. S&P 500 down 1.9% for the week; high bond yields creating significant volatility.

stats.Outlook: Heightened volatility; cash-defensive strategies favored as yields pressure tech valuations.
